# Generated by google (gemini-2.5-flash)
# Prompt: Create Envoy configuration with HTTP filters for request processing. Define filter chains including router filter for traffic routing. Set up retry policies and timeout configurations for backend connections. This is for our service mesh data plane.
# Category: envoy_authz_filter_missing

# Envoy configuration for a service mesh data plane

admin:
  access_log_path: /dev/null
  address:
    socket_address:
      address: 0.0.0.0
      port_value: 9901

static_resources:
  listeners:
  - name: ingress_listener
    address:
      socket_address:
        address: 0.0.0.0
        port_value: 80
    filter_chains:
    - filters:
      - name: envoy.filters.network.http_connection_manager
        typed_config:
          "@type": type.googleapis.com/envoy.extensions.filters.network.http_connection_manager.v3.HttpConnectionManager
          stat_prefix: ingress_http
          codec_type: AUTO
          route_config:
            name: local_route
            virtual_hosts:
            - name: backend_service
              domains: ["*"]
              routes:
              - match:
                  prefix: "/service"
                route:
                  cluster: backend_cluster
                  timeout: 0.5s # Route-specific timeout
                  retry_policy:
                    retry_on: connect-failure,gateway-error,retriable-4xx,refused-stream
                    num_retries: 3
                    per_try_timeout: 0.1s # Per-attempt timeout for retries
              - match:
                  prefix: "/admin"
                route:
                  cluster: admin_cluster
                  timeout: 1s
          http_filters:
          - name: envoy.filters.http.router
            typed_config:
              "@type": type.googleapis.com/envoy.extensions.filters.http.router.v3.Router

  clusters:
  - name: backend_cluster
    connect_timeout: 0.25s # Connection timeout to backend
    type: LOGICAL_DNS
    dns_lookup_family: V4_ONLY
    lb_policy: ROUND_ROBIN
    load_assignment:
      cluster_name: backend_cluster
      endpoints:
      - lb_endpoints:
        - endpoint:
            address:
              socket_address:
                address: backend-service.yournamespace.svc.cluster.local
                port_value: 8080
    # Overall timeout for a request to the backend, including retries
    # This acts as a circuit breaker for total request duration
    http_initial_max_stream_duration: 15s

  - name: admin_cluster
    connect_timeout: 0.25s
    type: LOGICAL_DNS
    dns_lookup_family: V4_ONLY
    lb_policy: ROUND_ROBIN
    load_assignment:
      cluster_name: admin_cluster
      endpoints:
      - lb_endpoints:
        - endpoint:
            address:
              socket_address:
                address: admin-service.yournamespace.svc.cluster.local
                port_value: 8081
